nasb.text: And He said to them, “Why is it that you were looking for Me? Did you not know that I had to be in My Father’s house?”

esv.text: And he said to them, “Why were you looking for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father’s house?”

cnv.text: 他說：“為甚麼找我呢？你們不知道我必須在我父的家裡嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们为什么找我呢？难道你们不知道我应该在我父的家吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们为什么找我呢？难道不知道我必须在我父的家里吗？”
